metadata.description: Standards bypass configuration for this branch

bypass.reason: Pure Python bootstrap — no branch imports by design
Circular import — display.py cannot import prax (prax depends on cli). Silent catches are ImportError guard for optional trigger and __main__ error handler.
Dependency-free by design — json_handler cannot import prax (circular: json_handler → prax → cli.display → json_handler). Catch regenerates corrupted JSON silently.

notes.usage: Add entries to 'bypass' list to exclude specific violations

example.reason: Circular dependency - logger cannot import CLI

fields.standard: Standard name: cli, imports, naming, etc. (required)
fields.lines: Optional - specific line numbers to bypass
